response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified Song 1 via on-screen text '強欲' at 00:00. Performed by Pekora, IRyS, and Baelz. Produced by Giga. Searched: "Gouyoku" Giga Japanese and English lyrics.
2. Identified Song 2 via on-screen text '虹色のフリューゲル' at 03:36. Performed by a larger group of Hololive talents. Original composer is Noriyasu Agematsu. Searched: "Nijiiro no Flügel" Japanese and English lyrics.
3. Formatted identified data and lyrics into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A two-song medley performed by Hololive members in a virtual live concert setting. The first song is 'Gouyoku' and the second is 'Nijiiro no Flügel'.

scenes.description: Characters Usada Pekora, IRyS, and Hakos Baelz perform the song 'Gouyoku'. On-screen text includes the title '強欲' (Gouyoku).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
I will cross my fingers, hoping not to be sacrificed
Just to stand there, and keep the others from being lonely
Get it, the burning, get ready for the time to come
I know who I am...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I'll cross my fingers, hoping not to be sacrificed
Just to stand there, and keep the others from being lonely
Get it, the burning, get ready for the time to come
I know who I am...

scenes.description: Characters Usada Pekora, Hakos Baelz, IRyS, Omaru Polka, and La+ Darknesss perform the song 'Nijiiro no Flügel'. On-screen text includes the title '虹色のフリューゲル'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Usada Pekora, IRyS, Hakos Baelz, Omaru Polka, La+ Darknesss
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
聞こえますか…？
空へ解き放て
聞こえますか…？
命は始まり…
虹色のフリューゲル
神様も知らない
光で歴史を創ろう
不死なる炎
未来照らす
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Can you hear it...? The spreading music
To the heavens, let it ring out!
Can you hear it...? That calls forth life
When the star became music...
